Holds

Name ILS Approach Altitude Speed (IAS) Inbound CRS Turn Remarks
NV ILS / RNP FL100 230 KT 106º Right RWY06
ILS W 129º
STONY - 9000ft 230 KT 287º Left -

Missed Approach Procedures

Rwy Approach Missed Approach Procedure Hold Remarks
06 ILS Climb on Runway Heading to 6000ft or NV VOR, then turn right climbing to 9000ft to the TV VOR and hold, or as directed. STONY -
ILS W -
ILS Y -
ILS Z -
RNP Proceed direct APDUS climbing to FL100. Passing 8100ft or APDUS, turn right direct to TV VOR and hold, or as directed. -
VOR DME Climb on Runway Heading to 6000ft or NV VOR, then turn right climbing to 9000ft to the TV VOR and hold, or as directed. -
24 RNP Proceed direct IBRAT climbing to FL100. Passing 9100ft or IBRAT, turn left direct to TV VOR and hold, or as directed. -
VOR DME Climb on R-233 NV to 6000ft or D3.4, then turn left climbing to 9000ft to TV VOR and hold, or as directed. -
